title: LGBeeT
body:
![L.G.Bee.T, an inclusive resourcepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2faea4a30d851e19f068b3629674b00808b03708.png)

---

Resource pack adding bee variants with LGBT flags (textures from the [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) mod).

Requires [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) to work properly.

# Included flags
![Asexual, agender, aromantic, genderfluid, genderqueer, bisexual, nonbinary, gay/pride, helen, intersex, lesbian, pansexual, polysexual, transgender](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8463bfbf2808aa440a172318efa95df0c0f38b22.png)
